feat.name: Metabolize Element
feat.text: Your rapidly metabolize the elemental particles in your opponent's spell to gain a boost of energy. You gain the quickened condition until the end of your next turn. You can use the extra action only to Step or Stride.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: You take damage from a foe's spell or magical ability with a trait of one of the elements in your elemental philosophy.
